changes: Staleness guard now checks $timestamp_raw (covers quote_time field)
M1 stream timestamp uses $timestamp_raw instead of payload['timestamp']
M15 stream timestamp uses $timestamp_raw instead of payload['timestamp']
Audit log entry now records $timestamp_raw (not null when quote_time used)
Added candles[] array shim: if candle absent but candles[] present, promotes candles[0] as M1 candle (tick_volume->volume mapped)
Updated post_ea_market_stream docblock to document canonical and legacy formats
Docblock updated to document both canonical REST contract (quote_time/source/server_time/candles[]) and legacy EA format (timestamp/candle/candle_m15)
Added Test 12: quote_time alias accepted (canonical REST contract)
Added Test 13: candles[] array shim — candle promoted and stored
Added Test 14: Stale quote_time rejected with HTTP 422 (staleness guard active on alias)
